news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs
GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs.

GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HOYY, SMYY, BBYY, FBYY, IOYY, MAAY, NUGY, SEMY, QBY, RGYY, HMYY, RTYY, MUYY, TMYY, CWY, CRY and 20+ Others
GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HOYY, SMYY, BBYY, FBYY, IOYY, MAAY, NUGY, SEMY, QBY, RGYY, and HMYY

GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HOYY, SMYY, BBYY, FBYY, IOYY, MAAY, NUGY, SEMY, QBY, RGYY, HMYY and RTYY

holdings.infoBox: SEMY is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings.

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBOOST Semiconductor ETF (SEMY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is an actively managed fund seeking to provide weekly income. The fund strategy involves writing put options on 3x daily leveraged ETFs tied to the NYSE Semiconductor Index SEMY was launched on Nov 18, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
